purpose: training-only characterization of graph domains for a conditional edge-DP link-prediction feasibility boundary

prohibited: P5FC confirmatory records as model inputs

properties.public_feature_auc: ROC-AUC of frozen sparse public-feature cosine on P3 validation candidates
properties.common_neighbor_auc: ROC-AUC of common-neighbor score from the training-positive graph on P3 validation candidates
properties.preferential_attachment_auc: ROC-AUC of training-degree product on P3 validation candidates
properties.mean_degree: mean training degree over all registered nodes
properties.degree_cv: standard deviation divided by mean training degree
properties.largest_component_fraction: fraction of registered nodes in the largest training component
properties.sampled_average_clustering: deterministic average local clustering over at most 2000 registered nodes
properties.degree_assortativity: training-graph degree assortativity; zero only for an undefined finite limit
properties.louvain_modularity: deterministic Louvain modularity on the training graph
properties.cross_client_edge_fraction: fraction of training positives whose endpoints have different frozen homes
properties.public_feature_coverage: fraction of nodes with at least one registered public descriptor
properties.public_feature_density: nonzeros divided by node count times descriptor dimension

reporting.dataset_summary: mean and sample standard deviation across five frozen seeds
